data.body:
SESSION SUMMARY — epic 88ab (feature-branch flow) execution + new auto-deploy story 8903.

DONE + LANDED + CLOSED:
- S1 (bored-tag-sale): Gerrit gate/ACL config — MERGE_FIRST_PARENT_UPDATE copyCondition (LLM-Review carries, Verified re-runs), [submit] pin, feature-branch-drivers group + Create/Delete + exclusive pushMerge ACLs, ADR 0025, docs. Live-verified on Gerrit 3.14.1 (change 185 merged). KEY FIX: additive pushMerge did not restrict until exclusiveGroupPermissions added (All-Projects grants pushMerge on refs/for/* to Registered Users).
- S2 (urge-brook-plume): review-bot merge-change path — gerrit_client get_commit/get_merge_files/get_file_diff/get_mergelist; voter merge detection (webhook+backfill+/rerun); assemble_merge_change_context; adapter merge_commits tag; MERGE_CHANGE_ERROR metric + monitoring_88ab.tf; merge-path failures -> -1 coverage-gap; debug logging (merge_detection/merge_change_review/voter_voted). Live smoke: change 183 got [LLM-Review: PASS (merge-change, 1 integrated commit(s))]. Change 197 merged. Follow-up noted: merge_change_409_guard event name not emitted.

S3 (will-tile-plum) — MOSTLY DONE, code landed (change 216), ticket still in_progress:
- AC1 DONE: g2p does NOT branch-filter (source lfit/releng-gerrit_to_platform@44d5d46). BUT workflow_dispatch(ref=refs/heads/{branch}) needs the branch on the GitHub mirror. FIX (landed): replication.config replicates refs/heads/feature/* + g2p ini dispatch note. DEPLOYED live via autoReload (no restart).
- AC2 DONE: pre-fix change 198 got NO CI; post-fix 200/201 dispatched CI, 201 got Verified+1. 
- AC3 DONE: merge change 215 (2-parent 2533a353) got CI on the merge tree (checked out refs/changes/15/215/1), Verified=MAX.
- AC4/AC5 NOT DONE: Verified-re-runs-on-re-merge + concurrency. (Paused mid-re-merge; note: to make a re-merge patchset, reuse the SAME Change-Id trailer, else it creates a new change.)
- Follow-up ticket fern-belief-gap: exclude feature/** from test/eval/optionality push:['**'] triggers (mirror CI fan-out).

NEW: auto-deploy story 8903 (continuous auto-deploy) — DESIGNED, GATED (plan-review PASS v4), CODE LANDING (changes 229 hotfix + 230):
- config-check (make config-check in test.yml+gerrit-verify): reject malformed infra config at the gate. Built+tested (passes valid, fails malformed).
- autodeploy.sh + systemd units + observability §4d + monitoring_autodeploy.tf + runbook. On-box systemd timer; SHA-keyed capped exponential backoff (Flux/Argo/systemd research, base 60s cap 15m, new-SHA resets); health-check+rollback; bounded blast radius (never touches gerrit container / refs/meta/config).
- LIVE DEPLOYMENT NOT DONE. Blocker discovered: autodeploy.sh assumes a git checkout at the compose context, but the box uses a COPY-BASED deploy (/opt/rebar is not a git repo; compose working_dir=/opt/rebar/infra/compose; there are /opt/rebar.bak.* copies). autodeploy.sh needs box-adaptation: maintain its OWN mirror clone + safe rsync into /opt/rebar (excluding .env/secrets/volumes), then compose build/up. systemd is 252 (no RestartSteps; use script backoff). review-bot health: http://localhost:8000/health (works). DEPLOY_REPO default /opt/rebar/src is WRONG (should be the box-adapted paths).

BUGS FILED:
- spy-luge-wool (b54e-9a31): plan-review INDETERMINATE when verify step hits token cap (finish_reason=length). ALSO code-review path: -1 BLOCK with 0 findings (reason=finding, not coverage-gap) — 59bc fix IS deployed but does not cover this. Root-cause: adapter should map non-PASS-with-0-findings-no-gap to coverage-gap/INDETERMINATE, not 'finding'.
- a425-71e9: main lint-red F811 (impact re-export shadow in passes.py) via merge skew (per-change-ref CI misses the merge result). Fix landing as change 229.

BOX/ENV: EC2 i-00880b2c7f13527c5 (rebar-gerrit), reachable via SSM (AWS root creds). Gerrit admin via JoeOakhartNava (HTTPS + registered SSH ok). Deployed review-bot is PRE-S2 (409s on merges) — S5 needs it redeployed (which 8903 would automate).

PROCESS NOTE (operator instruction): update the ticket + re-pass the plan-review gate BEFORE deviating from a plan. Followed for the S3 replication fix (re-gated) and the 8903 scope additions (backoff, CI-check, stability — re-gated v1->v4).
